body:
⚠️ *IMPORTANT ANNOUNCEMENT: COPY SUBMISSION* ⚠️

> *Subject:* History  
> *Deadline:* Next Wednesday (08 July 2026)

All students must complete and submit their notebooks as detailed below:

📚 *CLASSWORK (CW) COPY*  
- Complete all Textbook Exercise Questions.  
- Complete the 17 Extra Questions provided in class.

🏡 *HOMEWORK (HW) COPY*  
- Complete all Regular Homework assignments.  
- Complete the assigned Holiday Homework.

```Note: Ensure your work is neat, covered, and well-maintained. Late submissions will affect your internal grades.```

Thank you.
